title: Iran War Live Updates: Gulf Nations and Israel Face New Attacks After Trump Claims Military Success
summary_full: President Trump said the United States would hit Iran “extremely hard” over the next two to three weeks. He said the war was already a success but did not offer a concrete exit timeline.
summary_public: President Trump said the United States would hit Iran “extremely hard” over the next two to three weeks. He said the war was already a success but did not offer a concrete exit timeline.
